item.title: Lily having just come back from a Flotilla to Cuba bringing humanitarian aid to the nation that America is starving, talks about...
item.description:
Lily having just come back from a Flotilla to Cuba bringing humanitarian aid to the nation that America is starving, talks about how one of the most effective things the American propaganda machine has done is deprive anyone of a point of comparison for the depravity in the empire

item.title: The first step to undermining the right is deeply understanding it in all its extremely ridiculousness and absurdity, of which R...
item.description:
The first step to undermining the right is deeply understanding it in all its extremely ridiculousness and absurdity, of which Rhodesia is a part

item.title: Lily Eagla having just come back from the flotilla to Cuba, talks about how the Cuban revolution has been simultaneous of the br...
item.description:
Lily Eagla having just come back from the flotilla to Cuba, talks about how the Cuban revolution has been simultaneous of the brutal and murderous American blockade of Cuba.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: The space between who they want us to care about and who we care about is growing larger and that is a good metric for how power...
item.description:
The space between who they want us to care about and who we care about is growing larger and that is a good metric for how powerful the empire is ceasing to be



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Lily Eagla talk talks about her visit to Cuba bringing humanitarian aid while America strangles it and what was learned about th...
item.description:
Lily Eagla talk talks about her visit to Cuba bringing humanitarian aid while America strangles it and what was learned about the Cuban healthcare system and how even with how much that country is struggling due to American imperialism it is still striking to see them care for each other in a way that America does not



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
